column1: # TTT was biggest single gain (~0.04 BPB). We only tested TTT_EPOCHS and locked at 1.

# Defaults: TTT_LR=0.005, TTT_EPOCHS=3 (we use 1), TTT_MOMENTUM=0.9, TTT_CHUNK_TOKENS=32768
# ETLB_ENABLED=0 by default — completely untested, may be significant.

# All use full locked config: QK=5.5 WD=0.64 TTT+sliding EMA=0.995 SOFTCAP=20
# MATRIX_LR left at default 0.022 (sweep_17 still running — lock after results)
